description: GET /v1/sessions/{name}/control/events. `id:`+`event:`+`data:` — TODAY == TARGET at the framing level (the only Phase-1 change is the additive body `type`). The event name lives on the `event:` line; the body is a typeless object. This is why Ruby needs a parser that reads the event-line-as-type (the consolidation target).

vectors.name: happy
